idea-plugin.name: FastGradleCN
idea-plugin.description:
Automatically apply Chinese mirror repositories to Gradle projects for faster dependency downloads in mainland China.

Features:
  • Auto-detects missing mirrors on project open and prompts to apply
  • Injects Aliyun mirrors into settings.gradle(.kts) — both pluginManagement.repositories and dependencyResolutionManagement.repositories
  • Replaces Gradle distribution URL in gradle-wrapper.properties with Tencent mirror
  • Supports both Kotlin DSL (.kts) and Groovy DSL
Usage: Open a Gradle project and click "Apply Mirrors" in the notification, the FastGradleCN tool window, or via Tools → Apply CN Gradle Mirrors.

action.description: Inject Aliyun + Tencent mirrors into Gradle settings and wrapper
